name: Apple Ring Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt).
2. Add the milk and egg to the sifted ingredients. Beat well until smooth.
3. Peel and core the apples. Slice them into rings that are about 1/2-inch thick.
4. Dip each apple ring into the batter, then carefully drop them into a skillet containing enough hot melted shortening to cover about 1/2 inch depth.
5. Fry the apple rings until they are golden brown on both sides.
6. Remove the fritters from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
7. Mix sugar and cinnamon together in a bowl.
8. Sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture over the hot fritters.
9. Serve 16 to 20 pieces.
